text.message: oh man, gonna be a painful one
my plan was taken 6 4 3 in the way back
i had a game earlier today the 11s and 12s were the most common rolls.  was bonkers
omg, gonna be waiting foreva to 4-1 a wheat.  lol
i hope there are so many 3/11s blue has to trade :)
thought i'd have sheep this game.  lol
i'm gonna 7 out so don't really need
oh man.  i gotta try the wheat.
i'm sorry some people will solo me all game for that.  not sure how green plays...
also sorry cause you got the city dude
its good the wood for me
yeah, but like , you have a city, why not oj
no one fights road with red here
folks will trade you wood dude
except you're scarier than me with road.  lol
ok but you put on me now or later who cares
just give info to help decide who you want to rob
but the wood port gives flexibility
then you have all the wheat :)
will you guys help me plow red?
cant do it when im soloed
hey man, gotta get my spot.  lol
but yeah, oj hands game to blue/green.  lol
yeah dude, you try to plow me
i don't care about the steal
you know I cant get it before you
of course you can.  yo uasked table for help
you could have asked for cards
